reasoning: The control AC-4(25) focuses on ensuring secure data transfer, which in Kubernetes can be enforced through several mechanisms. NetworkPolicies can enforce TLS for secure communication between pods. Ingress controllers can be configured to require TLS for external communications. Service meshes like Istio or Linkerd can enforce mutual TLS (mTLS) for service-to-service communication. Additionally, admission controllers can be used to enforce data sanitization policies before data is transferred.
title: Information Flow Enforcement - Information flow enforcement | data sanitization when transferring information b
